share_tropa.title: Rally the Troops
share_tropa.subtitle: Heart Club · Global Football Census
share_tropa.banner_alt: Ambassador Journey — Bronze, Silver, Gold, Diamond
share_tropa.invite_text:
⚽ YOU'VE BEEN DRAFTED TO HEART CLUB! 🧡

I just voted for our team! Heart Club is the biggest fan census in the world.

HOW IT WORKS:
1️⃣ Click the link below and cast your vote.
2️⃣ Vote for your Heart Club ❤️ AND up to 4 Sympathy Clubs 🧡
3️⃣ After voting, you get a unique Invite Code.
4️⃣ Click 'Rally the Troops' and call your friends.

The more people vote with your invite, the more points you earn to level up: Bronze ➔ Silver ➔ Gold ➔ DIAMOND! 💎

Diamond Ambassadors will get exclusive rewards in the future. Let's dominate the ranking!

👇 VOTE NOW AND RALLY:
